best_round.title: An Adequate Substitute for Sex Ed

voters.name: Amanda
voters.comment: Hit right for me this round.

voters.name: Steve
voters.comment: DUDE!

voters.name: Caleb
voters.comment: The week of Easter weekend

voters.name: Ola
voters.comment: one of my foats (faves of all time)

voters.name: Dorothy
voters.comment: This was an interesting song

voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: Love me some Cake, though Comfort Eagle is one of those titular songs that never held up to other songs on the album for me. However, if I had a point left to give, I'd give it here!

voters.name: Ola
voters.comment: cake 4ever

voters.name: Steve
voters.comment: Not as good as Ozzy but still a nice tribute

voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: HE'S GOING THE DISTANCE.

voters.name: Rose
voters.comment: Lovely to finally know why I always say I'm going for speed when someone says their going the distance.

voters.name: Caleb
voters.comment: A classic CAKE. BTW, it's bass. Like the fish. Though that might have been autocorrect... Well, here's 2 points anyway.

voters.name: Sarah
voters.comment: I'm personally not the biggest fan of the genre of music that's just a dude talking with music in the background but this one did kinda grow on me as I kept listening to it.
